entities.name: max
entities.context: a variable representing the maximum number of items allowed

entities.name: maxSize
entities.context: a property that defines the maximum size of item storage

entities.name: ttl
entities.context: a property that may affect item expiration

entities.name: item
entities.context: the individual objects being stored in the system

relationships.context: max refers to the maximum number of items correlated with maxSize
max is related to ttl in that one must be set if the other is not specified
